settings.title: Ribbed neck that won't sag
settings.copy: Double-layered ribbed collar with reinforced stitching — holds its shape on the 50th wear like the first.

settings.title: True drop-shoulder cut
settings.copy: Pattern-cut for the oversized silhouette — relaxed through the shoulder without looking sloppy.

settings.title: Refined embroidery & print
settings.copy: Precision embroidery and high-density prints that survive wash after wash without cracking.

settings.title: Double-needle hem
settings.copy: Twin-stitched hem and sleeves for structure at the edges — where cheap tees give up first.

settings.title: Cash on delivery
settings.text: Pay only when the tee is in your hands.

settings.title: Easy size exchange
settings.text: Wrong size? We replace it — no long forms.

settings.title: Safe payments
settings.text: Your card & UPI details are always protected.

settings.title: Real people in support
settings.text: Email us — a real person replies fast.

settings.quote: The 240 GSM is no joke. Heaviest tee in my wardrobe. Cut is perfect — oversized but still clean.
settings.name: Aarav S.

settings.quote: Finally a brand that gets minimal right. Not boring — confident. Wearing 'Focus' on repeat.
settings.name: Ishita K.

settings.quote: I've spent ₹3k on tees that feel cheaper than this ₹599 one. MODRN is doing something right.
settings.name: Tanvi R.

settings.quote: Packaging felt like unboxing a phone. Fit is exactly what was shown. Already ordered two more.
